name: Mist-Bound Vow
descriptionTemplate: [{Devour}: Temporarily reduce all enemies' {STR▼} by [Exhaustion:Arg1].] Gain [Arg2] Arithmetica and inflict [{Poison}:Arg3] {plural:[{Poison}:Arg3]|stack|stacks} of {Poison} on all enemies. Choose: {Betroth} or {Enthrall}.

patch.descriptionTemplate: [{Devour}: Temporarily reduce all enemies' {STR▼} by [Exhaustion:Arg1].] Gain [Arg2] Arithmetica and inflict [{Poison}:Arg3] {plural:[{Poison}:Arg3]|stack|stacks} of {Poison} on all enemies. The next {Resonance} effect triggered is doubled. Choose: {Betroth} or {Enthrall}.
